title: Have an app Idea and want to take it market? Lets develop it together!
excerpt:

I know that as you are working with clients and understand their pain points, many of you have amazing app ideas to address these needs but may not have the technical resource to bring your app ideas to ma…

posts.author: Workiflow (Keenan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Partners!

I know that as you are working with clients and understand their pain points, many of you have amazing app ideas to address these needs but may not have the technical resource to bring your app ideas to market.

We have a development team that is profecient in the monday SDK, node.js and react.js and would love to partner with you on these ideas to bring them to market.

Feel free to drop a comment or reach out to me with a direct message, and let’s discuss how we can turn your idea into an app!

posts.author: Nicolai0507 (Nicolaisemrau)
posts.cookedHtml: I have an App idea to connect Monday.com to multiple NAS providers. I also got the via code but I have no clue how to do that stuff.
